extension.summary: Filmy a serialy - vlastni knihovna pro Kodi
extension.description: KlempCinema je video plugin pro Kodi, ktery umoznuje prochazet rubriky Filmy a Serialy, vyhledavat tituly a prehravat je prostrednictvim Webshare uctu. Pred prvnim pouzitim vyplnte prihlasovaci udaje k Webshare v nastaveni doplnku.
extension.summary: Movies and TV shows - custom Kodi library
extension.description: KlempCinema is a Kodi video plugin that allows browsing Movies and TV shows sections, searching for titles and playing them via a Webshare account. Fill in your Webshare credentials in the addon settings before first use.
extension.news: v0.0.137 Koncerty: kratsi rozpocet nacitani + prefetch dalsi stranky stihne dobehnout -> plynule listovani i za stranou 2.
